text:
ANTPSYCT_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD ANTPSYCT_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication) : Antipsychotic (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking medication from the antipsychotic class and whether there was an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
540 ANTPSYCT_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD ANTPSYCT_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication) : Antipsychotic (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column
